events.title: West Philadelphia Sanctuary Writing Workshop
events.venue: The Rotunda, 4014 Walnut St, Philadelphia, PA 19104
events.description: A free creative writing gathering where participants can share work and connect with other writers in a relaxed, welcoming environment. All skill levels and styles welcome.

events.title: In-person! Vogue Practice Session
events.venue: The Rotunda, 4014 Walnut St, Philadelphia, PA 19104
events.description: Drop-in vogue practice session for those preparing for balls. Open to all participants at no cost (unless event is a ball with stated admission).

events.title: In-person! Weekly Improvised Music Drop-in Jam Session
events.venue: The Rotunda, 4014 Walnut St, Philadelphia, PA 19104
events.description: Open music session welcoming musicians of any genre, instrument, or experience level to collaborate with others.

events.title: Philly to Palestine Fashion Show
events.venue: The Rotunda, 4014 Walnut St, Philadelphia, PA 19104
events.description: Fashion show featuring runway performances, raffles, and dancing. Proceeds benefit West Philly housing stabilization and humanitarian aid to Gaza.
